title: LOW INCOME HOUSING - 211info
text: CASCADE MANAGEMENT INC LOW INCOME HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-income and subsidized rental housing. 9600 SW Oak Street Suite 200 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older. Some properties may only be for adults age 55 and older or those with disabilities. Hours: Varies by property Email (503) 682-7788 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (503) 682-7788 Corporate Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call specific property for information FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: Proof of income (most recent pay stub, Social Security award letter, verification of public assistance, etc.) AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADE MANAGEMENT INC
